content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve Debugging
content.seo_description: Overcome debugging bottlenecks with the Antigravity project template. A high-efficiency, beginner-friendly guide for freelancers using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Debugging slows your shipping velocity to a crawl. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you standardize your environment and architecture, allowing Claude Code to provide context-aware fixes. This system eliminates guesswork, turning hours of tedious troubleshooting into minutes of automated, high-precision resolution for your freelance client projects.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a screen at 2 AM, the client deadline is breathing down your neck, and the terminal is vomiting errors you don’t recognize. You aren’t just losing time; you’re losing your reputation as a reliable builder. The cycle of 'fix one bug, break two features' is the silent killer of every freelance career.

But what if you could bypass the chaos? The Antigravity project template acts as a rigorous structural framework that forces code quality from the first commit. By combining this with the analytical engine of Claude Code, you transform debugging from an exhausting mystery into a systematic, repeatable process that keeps your projects clean and your clients impressed.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Template
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure all dependencies and configurations are predictable for AI agents.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard boilerplate for a modern SaaS web app.

steps.title: Map the Error Surface
steps.description: Identify and isolate the specific module causing the current runtime failure to prevent cross-contamination.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current error logs and map the execution flow leading up to the crash within the Antigravity structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "analyze the error stack trace in /logs"

steps.title: Automate Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to compare your current, buggy code against the established Antigravity best practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the faulty component against the Antigravity architectural guidelines and propose a fix.

steps.title: Implement Unit Test Guards
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't introduce regressions by generating tests within the template's framework.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the corrected module to ensure it adheres to the Antigravity quality standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate vitest cases for the recent fix"

steps.title: Execute and Verify Deployment
steps.description: Finalize the hotfix and verify that the application state is consistent with the template requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the fix against the integration environment and confirm all Antigravity health checks pass.

pro_tips: Always run your debugging agents in a 'sandbox' branch to prevent the AI from refactoring your production codebase before verification.
Use Claude Code's 'chat' history to document your debugging steps, creating a searchable 'fix log' for future client questions.
Configure your Antigravity templates to include a 'troubleshooting.md' file that Claude can read to understand your specific coding style preferences.
If Claude gets stuck, ask it to 'explain the logic of the error in plain English' before you let it attempt a code patch.
Keep your project dependencies updated via the template command line to prevent 'dependency drift' which is the primary cause of phantom bugs.
resources: Best Practices for AI-Assisted Debugging: https://anthropic.com/blog
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module, begin creating custom Antigravity blueprints for your most common freelance project types to reduce future setup time by 80%.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start scaling your output. Our community of elite builders is already shipping faster, cleaner, and more profitable projects using these exact systems. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
